Whale

✅ Weight: 40g

✅ Material: ABS Plastic

✅ Function: Clockwork Swimming

Features:

Develop baby's motor skills, understanding of cause and effect, stimulates curiosity, imagination and the senses

Enjoy the bonding time with your baby

Create happy and exciting bathing atmosphere

Beautiful color come with Green, Blue and Red

Safe sensory bath toys for kids and the environment

Lightweight and easy to operate with small hands

Perfect as gift for kids birthday, baby shower, holidays, Christmas gift and any other special occasion

⭐2. Please allow slight measuring deviation due to manual measurement.

⭐3. As this is a clockwork toy, please do not use too much force to avoid damage.

⭐4. All packing is in OPP Bag.

❤️Thank you ❤️
